ActionReminders.//: W22 / docs29 §3.4 reminder+escalation sweep (app-owned Hangfire, ADR-0014). Days-based thresholds; OverdueMode = Once | DailyWhileOverdue; SweepCron = Hangfire CRON (default daily 06:00).

Keycloak.//: Keycloak OIDC realm (ADR-0004). Empty Authority => every token is rejected and protected endpoints return 401 (fail-closed). Set per environment via env vars.

RoleMapping.//: Keycloak claim -> canonical ACMP role. Standard shapes are handled automatically; ClaimToRole adds overrides. DefaultRole=null => deny when a validated token carries no recognised role (AC-003).
